info.title: PIA Developer Console API
info.description: PIA Platform Observability System — All data served through stable projections and versioned contracts.

schema.title: Response List Datasets Api V1 Datasets Get

get.description: Database Inspector: row counts for every canonical table.
Universal Object Explorer: search across all canonical types.
Retrieve any engineering object by its UUID.
Measurement Explorer: full transparency including formula, inputs, intermediate values.
Execution Explorer: full stage-by-stage breakdown.
Projection Status page: all projections with health, counts, and last-built time.
Projection Dependency Explorer: return DAG of dependencies for visual rendering.
Projection Dependency Explorer: return DAG of dependencies for visual rendering.
Event Explorer: query the immutable event log.
Lineage: all events that touched a specific canonical object.
Projection Status page: health, counts, latency, and metrics for all projections.
Force a full rebuild of a single projection.

post.description: Force a full rebuild of a single projection.
Full rebuild of all projections in dependency order.
Mark a projection stale without rebuilding it.

get.description: Replay from event log and rebuild all affected projections.

post.description: Replay from event log and rebuild all affected projections.

get.description: Projection execution history — every build attempt with metrics.
Projection execution history — every build attempt with metrics.

Projection Dependency Explorer: show what projections would rebuild
if a canonical object of the given type changed.
Example: /api/v1/registry/projection-engine/impact/measurement

post.description: Start a sync job. Returns job_id immediately; poll /sync/job/{job_id} for status.

get.description: Sync Explorer: full job status with progress counters.
Live running sync jobs.
Completed sync jobs.
Current GitHub API rate limit status.
System Health Contracts — every subsystem reports its status.
